title: Evangelion airing in Japan for the first time
display_title: Evangelion airing in Japan for the first time
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion airing in Japan for the first time.             Quote Post by TonyTH » Fri Oct 19, 2012 5:39 am So something I always was curious about, was how it was being in Japan while all this stuff was going on. Was it a very gradual growth in the fanbase, was the boom instant? From what I hear around here is that almost all of Japan was watching it and debating it and stuff. Were they all pissed at the ending of the TV show? Did EoE kill everything at the box office and cause mass depression across the country? Anyone have any articles or insight on this? I honestly wish I could of been over there when it was airing, sounds like a lot of fun.

[]: Re: Evangelion airing in Japan for the first time.             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Oct 19, 2012 9:42 am TonyTH wrote: Anyone have any articles or insight on this? I honestly wish I could of been over there when it was airing, sounds like a lot of fun.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Fri Oct 19, 2012 10:58 am I haven't heard of any articles, but as for insight, there would be two people who occasionaly come onto this forum who were watching the show at the time of the original airing. Carl Horn, who is the editor of the US editions of several Eva mangas stated in one of his essays that he was following it on VHS raws as they were coming in from Japan (it's been a while since I read that essay, so I might be wrong). And then there is also symbv, who I believe was in Japan at the time and was watching. But it would be best to hear it from these two as they could give you more details.

[]: Evangelion airing in Japan for the first time.             Quote Post by TonyTH » Fri Oct 19, 2012 5:39 am So something I always was curious about, was how it was being in Japan while all this stuff was going on. Was it a very gradual growth in the fanbase, was the boom instant? From what I hear around here is that almost all of Japan was watching it and debating it and stuff. Were they all pissed at the ending of the TV show? Did EoE kill everything at the box office and cause mass depression across the country? Anyone have any articles or insight on this? I honestly wish I could of been over there when it was airing, sounds like a lot of fun.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Fri Oct 19, 2012 10:58 am I haven't heard of any articles, but as for insight, there would be two people who occasionaly come onto this forum who were watching the show at the time of the original airing. Carl Horn, who is the editor of the US editions of several Eva mangas stated in one of his essays that he was following it on VHS raws as they were coming in from Japan (it's been a while since I read that essay, so I might be wrong). And then there is also symbv, who I believe was in Japan at the time and was watching. But it would be best to hear it from these two as they could give you more details.
